text:
is a man who owns a shooting gallery.

Appearance

Ness wears a light brown bandana, a light green t-shirt, and has sea-green pants. He has a light beard and mustache, brown hair on his sides, and has brown eyes.

Personality

Ness seems to be a nice man as seen when he greets his customers.

Story

During the summer festival, Ness is in charge of a shooting gallery. When Eren and his friends take an interest on it, Ness introduces himself and his hamster, Charrette. He loses his enthusiasm after Mikasa and Annie keep winning all the prizes at his gallery.
